docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100106590)
